title: Get Collection List Request
description: Request parameters for retrieving a collection list with resolved collections

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

list_id.description: ID of the collection list to retrieve

account.description: Account that owns the list. Required when the authenticated agent has access to multiple accounts and the list_id is not globally unique within that scope; optional otherwise.

resolve.description: Whether to apply filters and return resolved collections (default: true)

pagination.description: Pagination parameters. Uses higher limits than standard pagination because collection lists can contain thousands of entries.

max_results.description: Maximum number of collections to return per page

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page
